bird.name: 白头硬尾鸭
bird.summary: 白頭硬尾鴨（学名：學名：Oxyura leucocephala），屬於鴨科，非常典型地群居型水鴨類。 保育狀況 牠們被列為《瀕危野生動植物種國際貿易公約》附錄二的物種，被限制出口及貿易。

locations.name: 北非
locations.summary: 与撒哈拉以南非洲相对，北非（英语：North Africa或Northern Africa）即非洲大陆北部地区，习惯上为苏丹热带草原以北非洲广大区域。联合国定义的“北非”，是指撒哈拉沙漠以北地区，包括埃及、利比亚、阿尔及利亚、突尼斯、摩洛…

relations.subject: 白头硬尾鸭
relations.evidence: left|thumb|Egg, collection Museum Wiesbaden This duck breeds in Spain and North Africa, with a larger population in western and central Asia

relations.subject: 白头硬尾鸭
relations.evidence: Populations are declining, mostly due to loss of habitat and pollution, and the International Union for Conservation of Nature has rated the bird's status as "endangered"
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: 白头硬尾鸭
relations.evidence: Most of this decline is due to habitat loss and hunting, but interbreeding of the Spanish population with the introduced ruddy duck (Oxyura jamaicensis) is a more recent threat
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 白头硬尾鸭
relations.evidence: Most of this decline is due to habitat loss and hunting, but interbreeding of the Spanish population with the introduced ruddy duck (Oxyura jamaicensis) is a more recent threat
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
